items.title: US card networks accelerate bets on agentic AI
items.summary: Visa has deployed advanced artificial intelligence to help solve payment disputes and expedite corporate bill pay; while Mastercard adds Hong Kong to its global agentic commerce network.
items.editor_reason: Specific implementation of agentic AI by major card networks in production financial systems - concrete practitioner details on payment dispute resolution and corporate bill pay.

items.title: Is the Three Lines Model Still Valid in the Agentic Era?
items.summary:
Humans in the loop — actually empowered to act
The post Is the Three Lines Model Still Valid in the Agentic Era? appeared first on Corporate Compliance Insights.
items.editor_reason: Examines how traditional risk governance frameworks adapt to agentic AI systems - critical for regulated finance AI implementation.

items.title: Banking beyond the law
items.summary: A centuries-old network of secret codes and shadowy brokers continues to outpace financial systems controlled by the state- by Miles KellermanRead on Aeon
items.editor_reason: Deep historical analysis of informal financial networks that operate outside state control - intellectual history intersecting with modern fintech challenges.

items.title: Vulnerability Research Is Cooked
items.summary:
Vulnerability Research Is Cooked
Thomas Ptacek's take on the sudden and enormous impact the latest frontier models are having on the field of vulnerability research.

Within the next few months, coding agents will drastically alter both the practice and the economics of exploit development. Frontier model improvement won’t be a slow burn, but rather a step function. Substantial amounts of high-impact vulnerability research (maybe even most of it) will happen simply by pointing an agent at a sour
items.editor_reason: Experienced security researcher's analysis of how frontier AI models are transforming vulnerability research economics and practice.

items.title: Highlights from my conversation about agentic engineering on Lenny's Podcast
items.summary:
I was a guest on Lenny Rachitsky's podcast, in a new episode titled An AI state of the union: We've passed the inflection point, dark factories are coming, and automation timelines. It's available on YouTube, Spotify, and Apple Podcasts. Here are my highlights from our conversation, with relevant links.

 


  The November inflection point
  Software engineers as bellwethers for other information workers
  Writing code on my phone
  Responsible vibe coding
  Dark Factories and StrongDM
  The bot
items.editor_reason: Simon Willison's detailed analysis of agentic engineering patterns from hands-on experience building AI systems - practitioner insights on real implementation challenges.

items.title: Claude Code Found a Linux Vulnerability Hidden for 23 Years
items.summary:

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47633855
Points: 398
# Comments: 252
items.editor_reason: Real practitioner experience using Claude Code to find a 23-year-old Linux vulnerability - concrete example of AI-assisted security research in production.

items.title: Functional programming accellerates agentic feature development
items.summary: AI agents fail in production because of mutable state, hidden dependencies, and side effects the agent can't see. The fix is functional programming. SUPER and SPIRALS are the frameworks I use.
items.editor_reason: Practical framework (SUPER/SPIRALS) for building production agentic systems using functional programming principles - addresses real engineering challenges.

items.title: The IDE Is Dead. Long Live the ADE
items.summary: Why I told my engineers to delete their IDEs, what happened next, and where software development is actually heading.
items.editor_reason: Engineering leader's first-hand account of transitioning team from IDEs to AI development environments - real organizational transformation experience.

notes: Strong coverage of practical AI implementation in regulated finance
Good mix of technical depth and governance considerations
Simon Willison content continues to provide high-quality practitioner insights
Agentic AI governance emerging as key theme across multiple pillars
